The '''General Ministry Institutes''' were various centers of learning and research that were funded by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Galactic Republic General Ministry|General Ministry]] and then decades later by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic General Ministry|General Ministry]].

==History==
===Galactic Republic===
Prior to the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], the General Ministry slashed funding for the General Ministry Institutes in some cases by as much as 60 percent. This caused many of the institutes to look towards private donors for funding.

In the last years of the Old Republic, the institutes included:
*[[Extragalactic Society]]
*[[Fondor Academy of Engineering and Design]]
*[[Mrlsst Center for Linguistic Studies]]

===New Republic===
During the New Republic the institutes included:
*[[Astrographic Survey Institute]]
*[[Extragalactic Society]]
*[[Fondor Academy of Engineering and Design]]
*[[Institute for Sentient Studies]]
*[[Kellmer Institute of Galactic History]]
*[[Mrlsst Center for Linguistic Studies]]
